name: Cat Herders: Couch Coop Cat Corralling!
short_description: Herd a bunch of adorable cats in this chaotic 1-4 player, split-screen coop game. Herd the cats on each unique level into the goal as quickly as possible using a variety of zany items! Team up with your friends, compete for the best times, and shout at them for their silly strats!
detailed_description:
Cat Herders is a chaotic 1-4 player, split-screen coop game. It's about herding cats. Each level has a goal, and your job is to get the troublesome cats into that goal as quickly as possible using a variety of items!

We just pushed our big Anniversary Update which improves gameplay and the UI a whole bunch!





Use items like tuna, your computer keyboard and Cat Snax™ to draw cats towards the goal. Use scarier items like a barking robot dog to push them in whichever direction you please. Use more chill items like the music box to put them to sleep while you figure out a plan of attack. Use the cat trap to move multiple cats quickly. Create chaos with the cat cannon!


Coordinate with your friends in 2-4 player split-screen (Steam Remote Play/Parsec friendly!) to get the cats to the goal as fast as you can.


Compete to finish each level in the fastest time with gold, silver and bronze medal times. Compare your times to other cat herders on the online leaderboards!


Halloween and Christmas maps have been added! Herd cats in the abandoned medieval village while being hunted by the spoopy ghost cat or entice cats with presents in a beautiful winter wonderland.
